classification.loc_class: QC - Physics: plasma and electromagnetic fields

theory.canonical_statement: ID3371 records Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\refactored_derivations.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: \begin{align*} T_{\text{kinetic}} &= \tfrac{1}{2} g^{ij}[\Psi]\,\pi_i\pi_j,\\ U_{\text{magnetic}} &= -\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi]\cdot B_{\mathrm{ext}}(r_{\mathrm{cm}}(\Psi)) + \frac{\mu$_0}{8\pi}\int_V (|B_{\text{dipole}}|^2 + |B_{\text{gyro}}|^2)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ U_{\text{quantum}} &= \sum_n \hbar \omega_n\left(n_n + \tfrac{1}{2}\right)$ + U_{\text{tunnel}}[d(\Psi)],\\ H_{\text{coupling}} &= \frac{g_{\text{factor}}\,\mu_B}{\hbar}\,L_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]\cdot\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi] + $\lambda$_{\text{coupling}}\,A[r_{\text{obs}}]\cdot J_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]. \end{align*}
canonical_equation.source_section_latex: \begin{align*} T_{\text{kinetic}} &= \tfrac{1}{2} g^{ij}[\Psi]\,\pi_i\pi_j,\\ U_{\text{magnetic}} &= -\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi]\cdot B_{\mathrm{ext}}(r_{\mathrm{cm}}(\Psi)) + \frac{\mu$_0}{8\pi}\int_V (|B_{\text{dipole}}|^2 + |B_{\text{gyro}}|^2)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ U_{\text{quantum}} &= \sum_n \hbar \omega_n\left(n_n + \tfrac{1}{2}\right)$ + U_{\text{tunnel}}[d(\Psi)],\\ H_{\text{coupling}} &= \frac{g_{\text{factor}}\,\mu_B}{\hbar}\,L_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]\cdot\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi] + $\lambda$_{\text{coupling}}\,A[r_{\text{obs}}]\cdot J_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]. \end{align*}

id_system.loc_class: QC - Physics: plasma and electromagnetic fields

wolfram_form.existing_from_tex: \begin{align*} T_{\text{kinetic}} &= \tfrac{1}{2} g^{ij}[\Psi]\,\pi_i\pi_j,\\ U_{\text{magnetic}} &= -\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi]\cdot B_{\mathrm{ext}}(r_{\mathrm{cm}}(\Psi)) + \frac{\mu$_0}{8\pi}\int_V (|B_{\text{dipole}}|^2 + |B_{\text{gyro}}|^2)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ U_{\text{quantum}} &= \sum_n \hbar \omega_n\left(n_n + \tfrac{1}{2}\right)$ + U_{\text{tunnel}}[d(\Psi)],\\ H_{\text{coupling}} &= \frac{g_{\text{factor}}\,\mu_B}{\hbar}\,L_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]\cdot\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi] + $\lambda$_{\text{coupling}}\,A[r_{\text{obs}}]\cdot J_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]. \end{align*}

blocks.latex: \begin{align*} T_{\text{kinetic}} &= \tfrac{1}{2} g^{ij}[\Psi]\,\pi_i\pi_j,\\ U_{\text{magnetic}} &= -\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi]\cdot B_{\mathrm{ext}}(r_{\mathrm{cm}}(\Psi)) + \frac{\mu$_0}{8\pi}\int_V (|B_{\text{dipole}}|^2 + |B_{\text{gyro}}|^2)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ U_{\text{quantum}} &= \sum_n \hbar \omega_n\left(n_n + \tfrac{1}{2}\right)$ + U_{\text{tunnel}}[d(\Psi)],\\ H_{\text{coupling}} &= \frac{g_{\text{factor}}\,\mu_B}{\hbar}\,L_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]\cdot\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi] + $\lambda$_{\text{coupling}}\,A[r_{\text{obs}}]\cdot J_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]. \end{align*}

blocks.wolfram_input: HoldForm[TZPIDCanonicalLatex["ID3371", 1, "\\begin{align*} T_{\\text{kinetic}} &= \\tfrac{1}{2} g^{ij}[\\Psi]\\,\\pi_i\\pi_j,\\\\ U_{\\text{magnetic}} &= -\\mu_{\\mathrm{eff}}[\\Psi]\\cdot B_{\\mathrm{ext}}(r_{\\mathrm{cm}}(\\Psi)) + \\frac{\\mu$_0}{8\\pi}\\int_V (|B_{\\text{dipole}}|^2 + |B_{\\text{gyro}}|^2)\\,\\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\\\ U_{\\text{quantum}} &= \\sum_n \\hbar \\omega_n\\left(n_n + \\tfrac{1}{2}\\right)$ + U_{\\text{tunnel}}[d(\\Psi)],\\\\ H_{\\text{coupling}} &= \\frac{g_{\\text{factor}}\\,\\mu_B}{\\hbar}\\,L_{\\text{gyro}}[\\Psi]\\cdot\\mu_{\\mathrm{eff}}[\\Psi] + $\\lambda$_{\\text{coupling}}\\,A[r_{\\text{obs}}]\\cdot J_{\\text{gyro}}[\\Psi]. \\end{align*}"]]
